description: Configuration for automated recurring Sprint Meetings work items across all sprints

epic.title: Team Operations
epic.description: Umbrella epic for all team operational activities including sprint meetings, ceremonies, and team coordination

feature.title: Sprint Meetings
feature.description: Recurring sprint meetings and ceremonies across all iterations. Each sprint has a dedicated user story with tasks for all team members.

userStory.title: Meetings
userStory.descriptionTemplate: Sprint meetings and ceremonies for {{sprintName}} ({{startDate}} to {{finishDate}}). Each team member has an assigned task for tracking meeting participation and preparation.
acceptanceCriteria: All team members attend sprint planning
Sprint retrospective conducted and action items documented

task.descriptionTemplate:
Meeting participation and preparation tasks for {{firstName}} ({{fullName}}) during {{sprintName}}.

Responsibilities:
- Attend sprint planning and provide estimates
- Participate in daily standups
- Prepare for and attend sprint review
- Contribute to sprint retrospective

templateSettings._note: When enabled, clones from template work items instead of creating from scratch

MotherOps-Alpha.description: Set after creating golden template in Azure DevOps UI

MotherOps-Beta.description: Set after creating golden template in Azure DevOps UI

profileSettings._note: When enabled, uses team-meeting-profiles.json for team-specific configurations
